writing.title: Writing Task 2: Describe your experiences
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing your recent experiences and achievements, using Present Perfect (have/has + V3).
writing.sampleAnswer: I have had so many great experiences this year. I have completed my first marathon, which was a real challenge. I have also had a new opportunity at work.
checklist: Có ít nhất 2 trải nghiệm/thành tích khác nhau
Không dùng mốc thời gian cụ thể (yesterday, last year...)

writing.title: Writing Task 2: Things you have/haven't done
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) about things you have or haven't done, using ever/never.
writing.sampleAnswer: I have visited Da Lat twice. I have tried Vietnamese coffee many times. However, I have never met a famous person, and I have never travelled alone.
checklist: Có thể dùng ever trong câu hỏi
Liệt kê được ít nhất 3 trải nghiệm
